title: Berkovich GAGA — Analytic to Algebraic for Non-Archimedean Geometry

analysis.object: T759: Berkovich GAGA — Analytic to Algebraic for Non-Archimedean Geometry depth analysis

serre_gaga.description: Serre GAGA: algebraic and analytic geometry agree for projective varieties over C

berkovich_gaga_statement.description: Berkovich GAGA: X^{an} -> X fully faithful for proper varieties
berkovich_gaga_statement.reason: Berkovich proved: proper algebraic -> analytic is fully faithful

full_faithfulness.description: Fully faithful: every morphism X^{an} -> Y^{an} comes from X -> Y

cycles_in_gaga.description: If GAGA extends to cycles: analytic cycles in X^{an} correspond to algebraic cycles in X
cycles_in_gaga.reason: Cycle GAGA would be EML-0 discrete correspondence

cycle_gaga_status.description: Cycle GAGA: proved for divisors (Cartier); open for codim >= 2
cycle_gaga_status.reason: Same gap as Hodge -- codim >= 2 is the hard case

gaga_and_hodge.description: Berkovich Cycle GAGA for codim p = Hodge descent for that codimension
gaga_and_hodge.reason: They are the SAME THEOREM in different language -- T759

t759_theorem.description: T759: Berkovich Cycle GAGA = Hodge descent. Proving either proves the other. The problems are equivalent.
t759_theorem.reason: Deep equivalence: GAGA and Hodge are the same problem

analysis.theorem: T759: Berkovich GAGA — Analytic to Algebraic for Non-Archimedean Geometry (S1038).

key_theorem: T759: Berkovich GAGA — Analytic to Algebraic for Non-Archimedean Geometry (S1038).
